{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Overlord weapon
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|An [[Overlord weapon]] is a type of item that cannot be sensed by spirit sweeping.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
